motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def distanceTraveled(self, mainTank: int, additionalTank: int) -> int:
        total_distance = 0
        while mainTank > 0 or additionalTank > 0:
            distance = min(5, mainTank)
            total_distance += distance * 10
            mainTank -= distance
            if mainTank < 5 and additionalTank > 0:
                mainTank += 1
                additionalTank -= 1
        return total_distance
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n), where n is the number of iterations until one of the tanks is empty
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
